summary: Verified mobile+desktop placeholder fix for Home 'Book Your Transfer' Date/Time inputs. Type dynamically switches to 'text' when empty (showing friendly placeholder) and to 'date'/'time' on focus/when value present. Verified across all 5 languages (EN, FR, RU, HY, ES). Regression: submit still passes validation and preserves date/time values.
critical_code_review_comments: Home.js is 1378 lines — consider splitting the booking widget, hero section, SEO content blocks and reviews into their own components for maintainability.
onFocus/onBlur handlers use empty catch {} — acceptable for showPicker() polyfill, but consider gating on `if (typeof el.showPicker === 'function')` for cleaner code.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Placeholder fix on Home Date/Time inputs verified: (1) MOBILE 390x844 - empty state shows type='text' with placeholder 'Select a date' / 'Select a time'; onFocus switches type to 'date'/'time'; after filling and blur, type stays as 'date'/'time' and value persists ('2026-06-15', '14:30'); clearing and blur reverts type to 'text' with placeholder. (2) DESKTOP 1280x900 - same behavior verified. (3) i18n verified via URL prefixes /fr, /ru, /hy, /es and default / for EN — all 5 languages show correct localized placeholders. (4) Regression: form submit preserves date/time values; validation on missing address still fires ('Please fill in both addresses').
rca of the issue: N/A — feature confirmed working as designed.
